common.name: Name
common.leadNotesPlaceholder: What is this lead looking for?

editClient.title: Edit client
editClient.billingModeChangeNote: Note: the balance will be recalculated under the new billing mode.
editClient.totalDueHint: If you enter an amount here it overrides the automatic calculation (sessions × price) — handy for imported data.
editClient.billingHint: Total {{total}} · changing «Paid» → a money transaction · changing «Balance» → an adjustment. New sessions stay automatic by price.
editClient.perGroupHint: The amount you enter here overrides the charge coming from the group — for this client only.

meetingTypes.title: Meeting types
meetingTypes.empty: No meeting types yet. Add your first one below.
meetingTypes.priceHint: A price you set on a type applies automatically to clients linked to it — unless they have a manually-set price.

deleteClient.title: Delete client
deleteClient.introOne: Choose what to do with the transactions linked to this client. You can restore from the recycle bin within 30 days.
deleteClient.introMany: Choose what to do with the transactions linked to the selected clients. You can restore from the recycle bin within 30 days.
deleteClient.keepSub: The transactions stay in "Money" tagged "[name] · deleted". Use this when you want to keep the billing history.
deleteClient.cascadeSub: The transactions move to the recycle bin along with the client. Restoring the client does not restore them automatically.

convertLead.title: Convert lead to client
convertLead.nameRequired: Please give the client a name.
convertLead.footHint: A new client will be created; the lead will be marked "converted to client" and stay in the "Converted" column with a link to the new client.

addGroup.title: New group
addGroup.noneHint: No preset price. You can price each member individually from their client card.
addGroup.errPackagePrice: Please enter a positive package price.
addGroup.errSessions: Please enter a positive number of sessions.
addGroup.errPerSession: Please enter a positive price per session.

editGroup.title: Edit group
editGroup.noneHint: No preset price. You can price each member individually from their client card.
editGroup.errPackagePrice: Please enter a positive package price.
editGroup.errSessions: Please enter a positive number of sessions.
editGroup.errPerSession: Please enter a positive price per session.

addGroupMember.title: Add client to group
addGroupMember.allMembers: All your clients are already members of this group.

deleteGroup.title: Delete group
deleteGroup.intro: Choose what to do with the linked data.
deleteGroup.noData: No linked data — the group will be deleted.
deleteGroup.membersSub: Recommended: they'll be released and stay in the project as private clients.
deleteGroup.futureMeetingsSub: Recommended: delete — the recurring rule no longer exists.

deleteSubStatus.title: Delete sub-status "{{name}}"
deleteSubStatus.noneActive: No active assignments. You can delete it.
deleteSubStatus.affected_one: {{count}} active assignment will be affected by the deletion.
deleteSubStatus.affected_other: {{count}} active assignments will be affected by the deletion.
